text: fat is 100g. saturated fat is a major pressure point. for this category, the real question is fat quality.
carbs is 0g. everything else is fairly underwhelming. not relevant here.
protein is 0g. the rest is not doing much. also not relevant here.
vitamin e at 19% DV, vitamin k at 8% DV, vitamin a at 0% DV stand out most. that is barely moving the needle.
minerals are basically not part of the case here.

pros first. highly useful in cooking because practical culinary value matters here. efficient energy source because that can be a strength in the right context. helps meals actually work because a fat that people can use well matters more than a theoretical one.

on the weaker side. extremely calorie dense by default because that is the unavoidable category burden. easy to overpour without noticing because practical portion creep is real. not a complete food on its own because even the better fats are still just part of a meal.
B tier. Best in controlled amounts where fat quality is the main reason to use it.
